name: 910 Golf Simulator and Lounge
about: 910 Golf Simulator and Lounge is a premier entertainment venue offering golf simulation technology alongside a lounge atmosphere. The facility provides state-of-the-art golf simulators and a putting green for players of all skill levels, from PGA Tour practice to first-time golfers. Beyond golf, the venue features a variety of mini-games including skee ball, bowling, and darts, as well as an Xbox setup for video games. The space is designed for both casual play and events, featuring 5G high-speed Wi-Fi, an Anker PowerConf Speaker Phone, and ample seating. Operations are 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, with a focus on accessibility and a variety of entertainment options beyond just golf.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient 24/7 access to golf simulation technology
Family-friendly environment with diverse entertainment options beyond golf
Spacious lounge area suitable for both practice and social events
Accelerated play with full 9-hole rounds possible in under an hour
Ideal environment for beginners to learn without course pressure

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB policy allows guests to bring their own food and drinks
BYOB policy allows guests to bring their own alcoholic beverages

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided, but it mentions 'club rentals' as an amenity, suggesting rental options may be available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue operates on a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy, allowing guests to bring their own food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: You can play a full 9-hole round of golf in as little as an hour, with no chasing balls or waiting for slow players.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as family-friendly, offering mini-games like skee ball, bowling, and darts alongside golf simulation options.
